sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32082" key="e(kkaidekapa/laistos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑκκαιδεκα-πάλαιστος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[πᾰ]</pron>, <sense id="n32082.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ov, of sixteen palms,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:157" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.157</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
